title: Bright Pink Fuschia Tissue Paper Sheets for Wrapping 240 Large Sheets, Acid Free Art Paper, Perfect for Gift Wrap, Storage, Packing, Art & Craft Bulk Pack Archiving Shredding 70 x 50cm Sheet Size
features: BCreativetolearn Tissue Paper - Smooth, vibrant bright pink tissue paper. Perfect for gift wrapping, presents, art and craft work. Each pack contains 240 large sheets.

240 Fuchsia Tissue Paper Sheets - Each sheet of fuchsia tissue paper measures 70cm x 50cm. A perfect size for wrapping a gift or valuables. The tissue sheets are easy to cut for smaller projects or shredded for gift hampers.

Get Inspired - This strong and versatile, luxury tissue paper is 17gsm weight with consistent colour throughout each sheet. Use to make tissue pom poms, tissue flowers, table decor. Also great to use with wet strength tissue paper - layer over to add colour to your work.

Perfect Presentation - Large sheets of tissue paper are great for making amazing gift wrapping. Layer with other tissue paper colours for amazing effects. Use in gift boxes to protect and bring a gift to life. Add brightly coloured ribbons .
Acid Free Tissue Paper - This fuchsia tissue paper is acid free so great for archival work. Great for storing photographs, wrapping clothing and lining storage boxes.
description: Product Description Large Sheets of Fuchsia Tissue Paper Large Vibrant Sheets Each sheet is smooth, consistently coloured and high quality. Sheets are 70 x 50 cm - a great size for wrapping, making crafts and archival work Perfect For Wrapping! Add vibrant gift ribbons to add a certain something to your amazing gift wrapping A bulk pack of fuchsia tissue paper sheets. Each sheet is easy to cut or rip so a little can go a long way. Perfect to create shredded tissue paper for gift boxes or hampers 17gsm this tissue paper is perfect for using alongside wet strength tissue paper for model making Try layering tissue to get an amazing effect Light Pink Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Emerald Green Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Turquoise Blue Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Yellow Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Red Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Black Tissue Paper 240 Large Wrap Sheets Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.5 out of 5 stars 156 — — 4.5 out of 5 stars 154 Price £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £20.88 £ 20 . 88 £20.88 £ 20 . 88 £22.49 £ 22 . 49 Colour Light Pink Christmas Green Turquoise Yellow Red Black
